request: The ETL service account etl-runner@analytics-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com needs to write processed files into the bucket gs://analytics-prod-curated.

rationale.reason: append new processed objects to the bucket

alternatives: If the pipeline also overwrites existing objects, switch to roles/storage.objectAdmin on the same bucket
For read-back verification, grant an additional roles/storage.objectViewer binding
